title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions:
Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India Ventures Solutions!
